title: datacube-rs: an open-source Rust engine for streaming temporal analysis of remote-sensing data cubes
description: datacube-rs assembles satellite image time series from STAC/Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF into a (band, y, x, time) cube and applies per-pixel temporal estimators (OLS and Theil-Sen trend, tie-corrected Mann-Kendall, harmonic regression, OLS-CUSUM structural breaks) as validated native operators. The same Rust core is exposed as a library, a command-line tool, a Python extension (PyO3), and a WebAssembly module. Estimators are cross-validated to 1e-9 numerical parity against pyMannKendall, SciPy, NumPy and statsmodels. Dual-licensed MIT OR Apache-2.0.

creators.name: Parra, Francisco
creators.affiliation: Department of Informatics Engineering, Universidad de Santiago de Chile (USACH), Santiago, Chile
